source_watchlist.purpose: Find runtime capabilities that may improve worker dispatch, approvals, proof or rollback.
Find repeated blockers, skipped evidence, weak worker packets or slow gates.
Find repeated friction reported by factory workers or reviewers.

signals.public_safe_summary: Hermes announces a worker/thread orchestration capability.
signals.benefit_hypothesis: The factory may reduce manual worker routing if the adapter can use the capability safely.
signals.risk: Adapter compatibility, unexpected card mutation, approval bypass or rollback weakness.
signals.validation_expected: Run disposable Hermes smoke, no-spawn safety check, compatibility manifest and rollback plan before changing the adapter.

issues_to_create: Evaluate Hermes orchestration update for factory worker dispatch
human_approval_boundary: Changing Hermes adapter/runtime behavior, worker registry, binding, permission class, security gate, release gate or methodology requires explicit human approval.
